name: proxywar-coworld
description: Coworld game/player adapter for Proxy War. Wraps the existing legal-action runner and preserves the LegalAction.id decision path; adds no second validator or runner.

scripts.build:image: npm run prepare:docker-context && docker build --platform linux/amd64 -f Dockerfile.coworld -t proxywar-coworld-local:latest .docker-context
scripts.certify: mkdir -p tmp && TMPDIR="$PWD/tmp" uvx --from coworld==0.1.15 coworld certify coworld/coworld_manifest.json --timeout-seconds 180
scripts.run:episode: mkdir -p tmp && TMPDIR="$PWD/tmp" uvx --from coworld==0.1.15 coworld run-episode coworld/coworld_manifest.json --verify-replay --timeout-seconds 3600
